nasb.text: To You, O Lord, I cry; For fire has devoured the pastures of the wilderness And the flame has burned up all the trees of the field.

esv.text: To you, O Lord, I call. For fire has devoured the pastures of the wilderness, and flame has burned all the trees of the field.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！我向你呼求， 因為火吞滅了曠野的草場， 火燄燒盡了田間所有的樹木。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，我向你呼求， 因为火焰吞灭了旷野的草场， 烈火烧光了田野的树木。
